description: HP 8340B (0.01-26.5 GHz) and HP 8341B (0.01-20 GHz) Synthesized Sweepers. Legacy HP-IB (IEEE-488) instruments using a two-letter mnemonic program-code language (NOT SCPI). The mnemonics correspond one-to-one with the front-panel keys (see Table 3-1, Index by Mode and Function, in the Operating Information manual). Numeric entries are completed with a units/scale terminator: frequency GZ/MZ/KZ/HZ (GHz/MHz/kHz/Hz), time SC/MS (sec/msec), and power DM/DB (dBm/dB). A leading 'SH' prefix on a mnemonic is the [SHIFT] (blue) shifted function of the corresponding key. Interrogated parameters are read back with the OP (Output Interrogated Parameter) command followed by the parameter's prefix (e.g. OPCW reads the CW frequency); other OUTPUT mnemonics (OA, OB, OC, OD, OF, OI, OK, OR, OL, OM, OS) return status or learn data.

identity.description: Output Firmware ID. Returns the instrument firmware/identity string. The 8340B/41B has no SCPI '*IDN?'; OI is the closest identity query (Output Firmware ID, Table 3-1 HP-IB Functions).

commands.name: start_frequency
commands.description: Set the START frequency of the START/STOP swept range. Complete the value with a frequency units terminator. [START FREQ] key.

commands.name: stop_frequency
commands.description: Set the STOP frequency of the START/STOP swept range. Complete the value with a frequency units terminator. [STOP FREQ] key.

commands.name: center_frequency
commands.description: Set the CENTER frequency (selects the CF/dF center-frequency / sweep-width mode). Complete the value with a frequency units terminator. [CF] key.

commands.name: sweep_width
commands.description: Set the sweep width (delta-F / dF) about the center frequency in the CF/dF mode. Complete the value with a frequency units terminator. [dF] key.

commands.name: zoom
commands.description: ZOOM. Shifted function of [SWEEP TIME] ([SHIFT] [SWEEP TIME]); zooms the swept span about the center frequency.

commands.name: cw_frequency
commands.description: Set the CW (continuous-wave) frequency and select CW mode. Complete the value with a frequency units terminator. [CW] key.

commands.name: cw_resolution
commands.description: CW RESOLUTION. Shifted function of [CW] ([SHIFT] [CW]); sets the CW frequency entry resolution.

commands.name: fast_phaselock
commands.description: Fast Phaselock Select: enables fast phase-lock mode for reduced switching time.

commands.name: marker_1
commands.description: Turn on and set Frequency Marker 1. Enter a frequency value with units to position the marker. Append M0 (M1M0) to turn marker 1 off. [M1] key.

commands.name: marker_2
commands.description: Turn on and set Frequency Marker 2. Enter a frequency value with units. Append M0 (M2M0) to turn marker 2 off. [M2] key.

commands.name: marker_3
commands.description: Turn on and set Frequency Marker 3. Append M0 (M3M0) to turn off. [M3] key.

commands.name: marker_4
commands.description: Turn on and set Frequency Marker 4. Append M0 (M4M0) to turn off. [M4] key.

commands.name: marker_5
commands.description: Turn on and set Frequency Marker 5. Append M0 (M5M0) to turn off. [M5] key.

commands.name: all_markers_off
commands.description: Turn off ALL markers. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [OFF]).

commands.name: marker_delta_on
commands.description: Turn on and set Marker Delta (MKR D) mode using markers 'm' and 'n'. [MKR D] key.

commands.name: marker_delta_off
commands.description: Turn off Marker Delta (MKR D OFF) mode.

commands.name: marker_to_center_frequency
commands.description: Set the active marker to the center frequency (MKR -> CF). [MKR -> CF] key.

commands.name: marker_sweep_on
commands.description: Marker 1-2 sweep ON: sweep between marker 1 and marker 2. [MKR SWEEP] key.

commands.name: marker_sweep_off
commands.description: Marker 1-2 sweep OFF.

commands.name: markers_to_start_stop
commands.description: Marker 1 -> START, Marker 2 -> STOP. Sets start frequency to marker 1 and stop frequency to marker 2. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [MKR SWEEP]).

commands.name: amplitude_marker_on
commands.description: Amplitude (frequency) marker ON: produces an amplitude blip at marker frequencies. [AMTD MKR] key.

commands.name: amplitude_marker_off
commands.description: Amplitude (frequency) marker OFF.

commands.name: sweep_continuous
commands.description: Continuous sweep mode. [CONT] key.

commands.name: sweep_single
commands.description: Single sweep. Arms/triggers a single sweep (SG is an equivalent code). [SINGLE] key.

commands.name: sweep_manual
commands.description: Manual frequency sweep mode; frequency is controlled manually (SM is an equivalent code). [MANUAL] key.

commands.name: trigger_free_run
commands.description: Sweep trigger = FREE RUN. [FREE RUN] key.

commands.name: trigger_line
commands.description: Sweep trigger = LINE. [LINE] key.

commands.name: trigger_external
commands.description: Sweep trigger = EXTERNAL. [EXT] key.

commands.name: sweep_time
commands.description: Set the sweep time. Complete the value with a time units terminator (SC = seconds, MS = milliseconds). [SWEEP TIME] key.

commands.name: rf_on_dwell
commands.description: RF on Dwell: increases dwell time by 100 microseconds per count entered for the value, up to 12.8 ms. Front-panel sequence [SHIFT] [MHz] [1] [7] [Hz] (or [SHIFT] [kHz] [n] [Hz] where n is the value). At Instrument Preset the pre-sweep / pre-CW step delay returns to 400 microseconds.

commands.name: stepped_sweep
commands.description: Stepped Sweep: select the stepped (synthesized) sweep mode.

commands.name: increment_frequency
commands.description: Increment Frequency: advance to the next frequency step in stepped sweep.

commands.name: reset_sweep
commands.description: Reset Sweep: reset the sweep to its start.

commands.name: take_sweep
commands.description: Take Sweep: trigger/execute a sweep.

commands.name: time_limit
commands.description: Time Limit: set the sweep time-limit control.

commands.name: instrument_preset
commands.description: Instrument Preset. Returns the instrument to its known preset state. [INSTR PRESET] key.

commands.name: alternate_sweep_on
commands.description: Alternate Sweep mode ON. [ALT] key.

commands.name: alternate_sweep_off
commands.description: Alternate Sweep mode OFF.

commands.name: select_foreground
commands.description: Alternate State Selection: select foreground state.

commands.name: select_background
commands.description: Alternate State Selection: select background state.

commands.name: save_state
commands.description: Save the current instrument state to a register. [SAVE] key. Follow with the register number.

commands.name: recall_state
commands.description: Recall an instrument state from a register. [RECALL] key. Follow with the register number.

commands.name: lock_registers
commands.description: Lock Save/Recall registers. Shifted function of [SAVE] ([SHIFT] [SAVE]).

commands.name: unlock_registers
commands.description: Unlock Save/Recall registers. Shifted function of [RECALL] ([SHIFT] [RECALL]).

commands.name: security_memory_erase
commands.description: Security Memory Erase: erase RAM and set all variables and Save/Recall registers to Instrument Preset conditions; working calibration constants are overwritten by the protected cal constants. Front-panel key sequence [SHIFT] [MHz] [1] [8] [Hz] (or [SHIFT] [kHz] [0] [Hz]).

commands.name: am_on
commands.description: Amplitude Modulation ON. [AM] key.

commands.name: am_off
commands.description: Amplitude Modulation OFF.

commands.name: pulse_mod_slow_rise_on
commands.description: Slow Rise Time Pulse Modulation ON. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [PULSE]).

commands.name: pulse_mod_on
commands.description: Normal Pulse Modulation ON. [PULSE] key.

commands.name: pulse_mod_off
commands.description: Pulse Modulation OFF.

commands.name: fm_on
commands.description: Frequency Modulation ON. [FM] key. (Code given as 'FM 1' in Table 3-1.)

commands.name: fm_off
commands.description: Frequency Modulation OFF. (Code given as 'FM 0' in Table 3-1.)

commands.name: fm_sensitivity_1mhz
commands.description: Set FM sensitivity to 1 MHz/Volt. Entered as [FM] [1] [MHz]; code 'FM 1 Mz'.

commands.name: fm_sensitivity_10mhz
commands.description: Set FM sensitivity to 10 MHz/Volt. Entered as [FM] [10] [MHz]; code 'FM 10 Mz'.

commands.name: power_level
commands.description: Set the output power level. Complete the value with a power units terminator (DM = dBm, DB = dB). [POWER LEVEL] key.

commands.name: power_sweep_on
commands.description: Power Sweep mode ON. [PWR SWP] key.

commands.name: power_sweep_off
commands.description: Power Sweep mode OFF.

commands.name: power_slope_on
commands.description: Power Slope mode ON (compensates power vs. frequency). [SLOPE] key.

commands.name: power_slope_off
commands.description: Power Slope mode OFF.

commands.name: rf_on
commands.description: RF output ON. [RF] key.

commands.name: rf_off
commands.description: RF output OFF.

commands.name: peak_on
commands.description: Peak output power ON (CW mode or manual sweep): peaks the YIG-tuned filter/output. [PEAK] key.

commands.name: peak_off
commands.description: Peak output power OFF.

commands.name: fast_peaking
commands.description: Instantaneous (fast) peaking. Shifted function of [AMTD MKR] ([SHIFT] [AMTD MKR]).

commands.name: auto_tracking_calibration
commands.description: Auto Tracking Calibration. Shifted function of [PEAK] ([SHIFT] [PEAK]).

commands.name: leveling_internal
commands.description: Internal leveling mode. [INT] key.

commands.name: leveling_external_crystal
commands.description: External crystal detector leveling mode. [XTAL] key.

commands.name: leveling_external_power_meter
commands.description: External power meter leveling mode. [METER] key.

commands.name: disable_alc_modulator_drive
commands.description: Disable ALC to control modulator drive directly. Shifted function of [METER] ([SHIFT] [METER]).

commands.name: external_source_module_leveling
commands.description: Enable external source module leveling mode. Shifted function of [XTAL] ([SHIFT] [XTAL]).

commands.name: search_power_level
commands.description: Disable ALC and search for desired power level. Shifted function of [INT] ([SHIFT] [INT]); SHAI is an equivalent code.

commands.name: decouple_alc_attenuator
commands.description: Decouple ALC and attenuator (control each independently). Shifted function of [PWR SWP] ([SHIFT] [PWR SWP]).

commands.name: control_step_attenuator
commands.description: Control the step attenuator independently. Shifted function of [SLOPE] ([SHIFT] [SLOPE]); AT is an equivalent code for independent attenuator control.

commands.name: independent_attenuator_control
commands.description: Independent Control of Attenuator: control the step attenuator independently of the ALC.

commands.name: frequency_step_size
commands.description: Set the frequency step size used by the step (up/down) keys. Shifted function form SHCF also accepted ([SHIFT] [CF]). Complete the value with a frequency units terminator.

commands.name: power_step_size
commands.description: Set the power step size used by the step (up/down) keys. Shifted function form SHPL also accepted ([SHIFT] [POWER LEVEL]). Complete the value with a power units terminator.

commands.name: step_up
commands.description: Increment the active parameter by one step size (STEP UP).

commands.name: step_down
commands.description: Decrement the active parameter by one step size (STEP DOWN).

commands.name: auto_coupled_mode
commands.description: Fixed function to coupled mode: set the active parameter to coupled (auto) mode. [Hz/AUTO] key.

commands.name: entry_off
commands.description: Disable the active function (ENTRY OFF); deactivates the currently active entry parameter. [ENTRY OFF] key.

commands.name: display_offset
commands.description: OFFSET FACTOR / display offset. Shifted function of [STOP FREQ] ([SHIFT] [STOP FREQ]).

commands.name: display_update_enable
commands.description: Re-enable display update. Shifted-key equivalent is [SHIFT] [LINE].

commands.name: display_update_disable
commands.description: Disable display update.

commands.name: xy_recorder_pen_lift_enable
commands.description: X-Y recorder interface: enable pen lift at bandcrossings.

commands.name: xy_recorder_pen_lift_disable
commands.description: X-Y recorder interface: disable pen lift at bandcrossings.

commands.name: retain_multiplication_off
commands.description: Frequency display scale: retain multiplication factor at off / on instrument preset. Shifted function of [START FREQ] ([SHIFT] [START FREQ]).

commands.name: retain_multiplication_on
commands.description: Frequency display scale: retain multiplication factor on at instrument preset. Shifted function of [ALT] ([SHIFT] [ALT]).

commands.name: disable_multiplication_preset
commands.description: Frequency display scale: disable multiplication factor (preset to 1). Shifted function of [INSTR PRESET] ([SHIFT] [INSTR PRESET]).

commands.name: display_mn_loop
commands.description: Display M, N, M/N freq. and 20/30 loop frequencies. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [M1]).

commands.name: display_band_yo_loop
commands.description: Display band number and Y.O. (YIG oscillator) loop frequency. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [M2]).

commands.name: display_vco
commands.description: Display VCO1 and VCO2 frequencies. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [M3]).

commands.name: diagnostic_tests
commands.description: Diagnostic Tests / Results display. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [M4]).

commands.name: front_panel_display_test
commands.description: Front Panel Display Test. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [FREE RUN]). Press [INSTR PRESET] or cycle power to exit.

commands.name: display_unlock
commands.description: Display Unlock indicators. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [EXT]).

commands.name: display_fault_indicators
commands.description: Display Fault Indicators. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [MANUAL]).

commands.name: disable_band_cross
commands.description: Disable band cross. Front-panel sequence [SHIFT] [MHz] [2] [3] [Hz] (or [SHIFT] [kHz] [0] [Hz]).

commands.name: reenable_band_cross
commands.description: Re-enable band cross. Front-panel sequence [SHIFT] [MHz] [2] [4] [Hz] (or [SHIFT] [kHz] [0] [Hz]).

commands.name: manual_band_cross
commands.description: Cause a manual band cross. Front-panel sequence [SHIFT] [MHz] [2] [2] [Hz] (or [SHIFT] [kHz] [0] [Hz]).

commands.name: diagnostics_off
commands.description: Turn off diagnostic display. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [M5]). (Does not deactivate the Front Panel Display Test.)

commands.name: select_channel
commands.description: Read/Write to internal circuits: SELECT CHANNEL. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [GHz/dB(m)]).

commands.name: select_subchannel
commands.description: Read/Write to internal circuits: SELECT SUBCHANNEL. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [MHz/sec]).

commands.name: write_data
commands.description: Read/Write to internal circuits: WRITE DATA. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [kHz/msec]).

commands.name: read_data
commands.description: Read/Write to internal circuits: READ DATA. Shifted function ([SHIFT] [Hz/AUTO]).

commands.name: clear_status_bytes
commands.description: Clear both status bytes.

commands.name: output_status_bytes
commands.description: Output both status bytes.

commands.name: mask_status_byte_1
commands.description: Mask status byte 1 (request/service-request mask). Follow with the mask value.

commands.name: mask_status_byte_2
commands.description: Mask status byte 2 (extended status mask). Follow with the mask value.

commands.name: output_learn_string
commands.description: Output Learn String: outputs the binary learn string representing the complete instrument state.

commands.name: input_learn_string
commands.description: Input Learn String: restore a previously read learn string to set the complete instrument state.

commands.name: output_mode_string
commands.description: Output Mode String: outputs a string describing the current operating modes.

commands.name: output_active_value
commands.description: Output Active Value: returns the value of the currently active parameter.

commands.name: output_next_bandcross_frequency
commands.description: Output Next Bandcross Frequency.

commands.name: output_coupled_parameters
commands.description: Output Coupled Parameters.

commands.name: output_diagnostics
commands.description: Output Diagnostics data.

commands.name: output_faults
commands.description: Output Faults.

commands.name: output_firmware_id
commands.description: Output Firmware ID: returns the instrument firmware identification string.

commands.name: output_last_lock_frequency
commands.description: Output Last Lock Frequency.

commands.name: output_interrogated_parameter
commands.description: Output Interrogated Parameter: send OP immediately followed by a parameter prefix to read that parameter's current value (e.g. OPCW reads the CW frequency, OPFA reads the start frequency, OPPL reads the power level).

commands.name: output_power_level
commands.description: Output Power Level: returns the current power level setting.

commands.name: network_analyzer_configure
commands.description: Network Analyzer configure: configures the sweeper for use with a network analyzer.

commands.name: advance_to_next_bandcrossing
commands.description: Advance to next bandcrossing.

commands.name: keyboard_release
commands.description: Keyboard Release: returns front-panel keyboard control to the local operator.

commands.name: swap_channels
commands.description: Swap Channels (foreground/background alternate sweep channels).

commands.name: enable_front_panel_knob
commands.description: Enable HP 8340B/41B front-panel knob.

commands.name: enable_remote_knob
commands.description: Enable remote knob (rotary input via HP-IB).

commands.name: test_hpib_data_transmission
commands.description: HP-IB Test: test HP-IB data transmission.
